summary: Iteration 73 - CMS Section-Label Extension Testing. All 14 test scenarios passed. Verified that all 11 remaining My Account pages now pull their h1 title from CMS 'My Account Navigation' labels via useOutletContext().sectionLabel(). End-to-end rename tests confirmed: (1) portfolios→'Investments' reflected in page title, (2) my-community→'My Team' reflected in page title. All labels restored after testing. Regression tests from iteration_72 passed.
critical_code_review_comments: All 11 My Account pages correctly use useOutletContext().sectionLabel(id, fallback) for h1 titles
MentorshipProfile.js: data-testid='mentorship-profile-title' on BOTH empty-state and populated paths
GlobalCalendar.js: data-testid='global-calendar-title' with dynamic ${auxPrefix} Calendar fallback - CMS wins when renamed
MyAccountLayout.js sectionLabel() correctly applies dynamic AUX prefix only when admin hasn't renamed the item
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 73 tested CMS section-label extension to all 11 remaining My Account pages. All pages now use useOutletContext().sectionLabel(id, fallback) for their h1 titles. End-to-end rename tests verified that CMS label changes propagate to page titles. Mentor-only pages (mentorship-calendar, earnings) were verified via grep since test member carlos is not a mentor. CMS state was restored after each rename test.

test_2_mentorship_profile.note: Both empty-state and populated paths have the data-testid

test_6_global_calendar.note: CMS-renamed label takes precedence over dynamic ${auxPrefix} Calendar fallback

test_7_mentorship_calendar.verification: Verified via grep - mentor-only page, admin redirected

test_8_earnings.verification: Verified via grep - mentor-only page, admin redirected

test_13_my_community_rename.verification: Member carlos visited /my-account/my-community - data-testid='my-community-title' showed 'My Team'

details.sidebar_ordering: Membership Settings (idx 31) → Security/Roles (idx 32) → Contacts (idx 33) - correct order
details.member_levels_permissions: All 13 permission checkboxes present with CMS labels
